metadata.description: Cross-host marketplace for amir (project-execution harness) and amir-asana (Asana MCP + skills).

plugins.name: amir
plugins.description: Portable multi-agent project-execution harness for Cursor: commands, rules, skills, hooks, JSON state, QA loops, and cost control.

plugins.name: amir-asana
plugins.description: Asana connector (MCP, 17 tools) + task skills: priorities, review, standup, triage, create/edit/complete, report sync.
